mission.title: gitea: Organization Members Page add "Invite Member" button
mission.description: Organization Members Page add "Invite Member" button. Requested by 44+ users.

steps.title: Check current gitea setup
steps.description:
Verify your gitea version and configuration:
```bash
gitea --version
```
This feature requires a working gitea installation.

steps.title: Review gitea configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant gitea configuration:
### Feature Description

I know how to add members in Teams, but there is a very hidden link before adding. You need to click "Teams"→team's name→"Add Team Member".

steps.title: Apply the fix for Organization Members Page add "Invite Member" button
steps.description:
Per the discussion on #22054, the flow for adding a new team member to an org is not intuitive for new Gitea users.

The ideal solution would be to add a new button on the Org > Members index view (see the screenshot mockup in the issue description). However, this would require a refactor of the UX for the flow. The current flow has an implicit context of which team within the org the new member is being added to ('Owners' by default). From the Members index, there is no implicit context; the

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected.
Confirm the feature described in "Organization Members Page add "Invite Member" button" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
Per the discussion on #22054, the flow for adding a new team member to an org is not intuitive for new Gitea users.

The ideal solution would be to add a new button on the Org > Members index view (see the screenshot mockup in the issue description). However, this would require a refactor of the UX for the flow.

prerequisites.description: A working gitea installation or development environment.
